dummyKey.title: Staples TECH USB-C to USB-C Charging Cable, 9.8 ft., White (ST62336)

paragraph: Power your smartphones and tablets with this extra-long durable Staples® USB-C to USB-C Braided Cable. The unique braided design provides extra durability, prevents tangles and has been tested to withstand up to five-thousand bends. A 9.8ft (3m) cable length gives plenty of extra reach when needed and is perfect for comfortably using devices while they charge.
bullets: 9.8ft (3m) USB-C to USB-C charging cable that transfers data at speeds of up to 480Mbps
Braided cable for durability and tangle-prevention tested to withstand up to 5K bends
Compatible with Apple, Samsung, Google and LG products
White Generation 2.0 cable
Supports fast charging up to 60W
1-year limited warranty
headliner: Charge and sync smartphones or tablets with this durable 9.8 ft (3m) Staples® USB-C to USB-C Braided Cable.
expandedDescr: More information for Staples return policy here

imageAltTexts: 360 Electrical Fluid USB-C to USB-C Charging Cable, 5 ft., Powder (3E0793-PDW8NA)~#|#~446CC6B6-EE7F-4114-A355234529EDD975_sc7
dummyKey.title: 360 Electrical Fluid USB-C to USB-C Charging Cable, 5 ft., Powder (3E0793-PDW8NA)

paragraph: Bending where others break, this 360 Electrical Fluid USB Type-C to USB Type-C cable is 20 times stronger and tested to withstand over 60000 full 180-degree rotational bend cycles with a 7 oz. weight attached. The materials and construction are carefully designed to allow the cord to flow freely, avoiding kinks and reducing visual clutter. Each band of the cord weave consists of three pre-coiled bundles, which not only prevents fibers from getting caught and fraying but also imparts an incredibly clean, premium feel.
bullets: This braided charging cable delivers an astounding 240W of charging power, which is enough for charging even the most powerful laptops
Connections: USB Type-C (male) to USB Type-C (male)
Comes in Powder color
Fusion Weave: braided construction makes the cable durable and kink-free
Flex Safe: intelligently designed strain relief bends where others break
Tested to withstand over 60000 full 180-degree bend cycles
Lifetime manufacturer limited warranty

dummyKey.title: Cascade Platinum Plus ActionPacs Dishwashing Detergent Pods, Fresh Scent, 47 Pods/Box (57893/6156)

paragraph: The Cascade Platinum Plus ActionPacs dishwasher detergent pod gives your dishes a breakthrough, cabinet-ready clean. Loaded with twice the grease fighting power, and twice the food scrubbing power, the pod has soaking, scrubbing, and rinsing built right in. You can skip the prerinse, skip the soak, skip the scrub, and dare to dish differently. Just scrape your dishes and load them into your dishwasher with the Platinum Plus ActionPacs pod to get a sparkling clean, saving you time, effort, and energy versus handwashing. Get virtually spot-free gleaming glassware, dazzling dishes, and pristine pots and pans with the Cascade Platinum Plus dishwashing ActionPacs dishwasher detergent pod.
bullets: Get virtually spot-free, sparkling clean dishes from even the toughest messes with this dishwasher detergent pod
Pack capacity: 28.4 oz.
Features a fresh scent
Loaded with twice the grease fighting power, and twice the food scrubbing power to power through dried-on food
40% larger liquid top for even more cleaning power that still fits in your dishwasher detergent dispenser
Formulated to help prevent hard water filming to keep your machine looking fresh and clean

imageAltTexts: JLab Studio On-Ear Headphones, Black (HASTUDIORBLK4)~#|#~sp124441151_sc7
JLab Studio On-Ear Headphones, Black (HASTUDIORBLK4)~#|#~sp124440992_sc7

dummyKey.title: JLab Studio On-Ear Headphones, Black (HASTUDIORBLK4)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: Studio comfort, with studio sound. Plug in and GO anywhere with the Studio Headphones, the braided nylon cord is durable to use all day, everyday. C3 Sound delivers crystal, clear, clarity audio so your music sounds perfect every time you plug in. Fold the earcups in for compact size to fit in any bag. These are the perfect go-to headphone.
bullets: The Studio Headphones are outfitted to pack a punch with 40mm neodymium drivers and JLab's exceptional C3 Technology (Crystal Clear Clarity). Immerse yourself in vibrant highs, mids and pumping bass while drowning out the world around you during an all-day jam sesh.

The Studio Headphones sit softly on your ears with the ultra-plush Faux Leather and Cloud Foam cushions. Comfort your noggin all day with this cool, sleek, headphone, guaranteed to provide the studio feel.

Wherever, whenever: Hook up the tangle free, braided-nylon cord equipped with an in-line mic for taking calls, firing up your tunes, pausing them and controlling the tracks on your mix. The 90 degree jack rocks with all devices and cases.

Built for everyone who loves to rock 'n' roll, the smooth-sliding metal adjustments and feather-light build are ready to hit the road. The plush circular ear cups rotate 80 degrees and fold up in the palm of your hand so you can bring them wherever life takes you.
Stainless steel headband with plush Memory Foam cushion
In-line universal mic with track control
Endless comfort with Cloud Foam cushions
Compact, folding design
40mm drivers
Frequency: 20Hz-20kHz
Braided nylon cord with 90 degree jack
JLab Lifetime Warranty
Black
headliner: On-ear wired headphones for all-day comfort with C3 Sound

paragraph: The Cascade Platinum Plus ActionPacs dishwasher detergent pod gives your dishes a breakthrough, cabinet-ready clean. Loaded with twice the grease fighting power, and twice the food scrubbing power, the pod has soaking, scrubbing, and rinsing built right in. You can skip the prerinse, skip the soak, skip the scrub, and dare to dish differently. Just scrape your dishes and load them into your dishwasher with the Platinum Plus ActionPacs pod to get a sparkling clean, saving you time, effort, and energy versus handwashing. Get virtually spot-free gleaming glassware, dazzling dishes, and pristine pots and pans with the Cascade Platinum Plus dishwashing ActionPacs dishwasher detergent pod.
bullets: Get virtually spot-free, sparkling clean dishes from even the toughest messes with this dishwasher detergent pod
Pack capacity: 28.4 oz.
Features a fresh scent
Loaded with twice the grease fighting power, and twice the food scrubbing power to power through dried-on food
40% larger liquid top for even more cleaning power that still fits in your dishwasher detergent dispenser
Formulated to help prevent hard water filming to keep your machine looking fresh and clean
